brand.name: SAFSEY IA
brand.disclaimer: SAFSEY IA can make mistakes. Verify important information.

header.image: Image Generator · Fooocus / local SD WebUI

welcome.title: SAFSEY IA
welcome.description: Ask a question, switch to {{fun}} for an ironic tone, or explore the {{image}} and {{video}} tabs.

items.title: AI news
items.prompt: What are the latest major breakthroughs in artificial intelligence?

items.title: Ironic mode
items.prompt: Explain machine learning to me with a sarcastic tone.

items.title: Code & design
items.prompt: Generate a React component with Tailwind for an animated gradient button.

items.title: Model comparison
items.prompt: Compare Llama 3, Mistral and GPT-4 for creative content generation.

chat.placeholder: Write your message to SAFSEY IA… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
chat.thinkingFun: SAFSEY is preparing a spicy answer…
chat.multimodalLimitReached: You have reached your daily limit of 3 free analyses. Subscribe to a pack to continue analyzing your content without restrictions.

billing.title: Refill my video minutes
billing.subtitle: Choose your pack. 1 credit = 1 second of avatar video generation.

image.title: Image Generator
image.subtitle: Fooocus / SD WebUI · local GPU
image.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to create…
presets: A futuristic neon city at night, rain reflections on the street, cinematic lighting
A peaceful Japanese garden in autumn, koi pond, maple trees, soft light
A robot explorer in an alien jungle, bioluminescent plants, golden hour
A cozy coffee shop interior, warm light, books on shelves, rainy window
image.noResultHint: Describe your scene, choose a style and click "Generate image".
image.processingHint: Fooocus is processing the image on your NVIDIA GPU. It usually takes 10 to 40 seconds.

video.title: Video Generator
video.subtitle: External Cloud API · no local GPU required
video.promptPlaceholder: Describe the video scene: camera movement, mood, style, subject…
presets: A futuristic neon cityscape at night with flying cars, cinematic slow pan, rain effects
A robot walking through a lush alien jungle, bioluminescent plants, golden hour lighting
A cozy café in Paris, rain on the window, warm bokeh lights, slow dolly shot
An astronaut floating in space near a colorful nebula, epic wide shot
video.durationLocked: Duration reserved for users who purchased credits
video.freeDurationNotice: Free version: the 3 trials are limited to 5-second videos.
video.freeDurationLimit: The free version is limited to 5-second videos. Buy credits to unlock longer durations.
video.freeTrialExhausted: You have exhausted your free credits. Refill your account to continue creating and analyzing your content.
video.cloudNotice: This service uses an external Cloud API (e.g. Luma, Runway, Replicate). No local GPU is required. Check your API key in the .env file.
video.noResultHint: Describe your video scene, choose the format and duration, then click "Generate video" to call the Cloud API.
video.processingHint: The Cloud API is generating your video. This can take from 30 seconds to several minutes.
